src: tansu is a lightweight, push-based framework-agnostic state management library. It borrows the ideas and APIs originally designed and implemented by Svelte stores and extends them with computed and batch.
ja: tansuは軽量でプッシュベース、フレームワーク非依存の状態管理ライブラリ。Svelteストアが設計・実装したアイデアとAPIを借用し、computedとbatchで拡張。
